summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JWT authentication and security features for Salary Calculator app. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend tests passed (100%). Security fixes verified: PostHog disabled, CORS restricted, security headers present.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200 with security headers
Backend: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Content-Security-Policy headers present
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns JWT token
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: Login with missing fields returns 422
Backend: Token verification with valid token returns 200
Backend: Token verification with invalid token returns 401
Backend: Token verification without token returns 401
Backend: /api/employees without auth returns 401
Backend: /api/employees with auth returns 200
Backend: /api/salary/history without auth returns 401
Backend: /api/salary/history with auth returns 200
Backend: /api/advance/list without auth returns 401
Backend: /api/advance/list with auth returns 200
Backend: CORS is restricted to specific domains (not wildcard *)
Backend: PostHog session recording disabled and opt_out_capturing called
Frontend: Unauthenticated user visiting / redirected to /login
Frontend: Login form elements present (username, password, submit button)
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard loads successfully after login
Frontend: /advance page loads without 401 errors after login
Frontend: /reports page loads without 401 errors after login
Frontend: /employees page loads without 401 errors after login
Frontend: Logout button redirects to /login
Frontend: After logout, visiting / redirects to /login
critical_code_review_comments: Security headers middleware correctly implemented in server.py
CORS properly restricted to agmsale.com domains
PostHog session recording disabled with disable_session_recording: true and posthog.opt_out_capturing()
JWT auth properly implemented with Bearer token in Authorization header
All protected endpoints correctly use Depends(get_current_user)
Frontend correctly stores token in sessionStorage and includes in API calls
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test credentials from test_credentials.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: JWT authentication and security features fully tested and working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_security.py covers all auth endpoints and security headers. Login credentials: admin/admin123. All protected routes require Bearer token in Authorization header.
